welcome.title: Vehicle Detail
welcome.description: This is the complete vehicle file. From here you can view all its info, manage documents, log expenses, and much more.

header.title: Header & Basic Info
header.description:
Key vehicle information: brand, model, year, plate, and current status.

The ACTIONS button lets you:
Generate quotations and reservations
Register the vehicle sale
Add expenses and income
Change the status
Delete the vehicle

tabs.title: Navigation Tabs
tabs.description:
Explore the different sections:

Summary: Gallery, general info, checklist, and financial summary
Timeline: Complete movement history
Details: Technical data and specifications
Documents: Quotations, reservations, and generated documents
Instagram: Direct social media publishing

finish.title: All Set!
finish.description:
You now know the vehicle detail view. Explore the different tabs to see all available information.

Remember that from ACTIONS you can perform all commercial operations.
